# llms.txt — AI crawler guidance
# See https://llmstxt.org for the specification

> 0-HITL

Zero Human In The Loop — an agentic AI automation platform.

## Public content

- [Home](/): Platform overview and waitlist
- [Learn](/learn): Tutorial catalogue — AI, automation, and agentic systems

## Restricted content (requires authentication)

- [Profile](/profile): User account management
- [Admin](/admin): Platform administration

## Do not index

- /api/*
- /admin/*
- /profile/*
- /login
- /register
- /reset-password
- /verify-email
